message:
fix(clients): update RCH client for doctor API changes

Update the RCH (Remote Compilation Helper) client to match
current API schema:

- Change check status enum from "warn" to "warning"
- Add optional "suggestion" field to doctor checks
- Update summary fields: pass→passed, warn→warnings, fail→failed
- Add "total" to summary and "fixes_applied" array
- Compute health metrics from new summary structure

These changes align the client with the latest rch doctor output
format which provides better diagnostic suggestions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
